fields.label: Marketplace
fields.description: Flat marketplace channel row this Account represents. The (company, marketplace) tuple is unique per the autoname pattern.

fields.label: Company
fields.description: ERPNext Company this seller account belongs to. SI created via §12 polling carries this Company.

fields.label: Seller ID
fields.description: Marketplace-side seller identifier (e.g., Amazon SellerCentral seller_id). Used as a sanity check on incoming orders — order's seller_id must match this Account or the order is flagged as a per-record failure.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: When OFF, the §12 polling cron skips this Marketplace Account. Use to pause integration without deleting the row.

fields.label: B2C Pool Customer
fields.description: Per §12 — every SI created for this Marketplace Account uses this Customer as the buyer (B2C marketplace orders share a single pool Customer; the actual buyer's address goes on the SI's Shipping Address). Auto-created on first insert of this row via the after_insert hook; named '<Marketplace> B2C Pool - <Company>'. Read-only — to override, change the Customer record itself; FDE should not re-point this field.

fields.label: EasyEcom Account
fields.description: Optional — which EasyEcom Account this Marketplace Account routes through. Used to scope the polling client + auth. If null, defaults to the EE Account inferred from the Source-of-Truth Map for the seller's primary warehouse.

fields.label: Last Pull (Orders)
fields.description: Cursor — the timestamp of the most recent successful /orders/V2/getAllOrders pull. Advances on each successful cycle. Initialised to NOW at first insert (forward-only cutover; historical orders are §102 backfill territory).

fields.label: Polling Cadence (minutes)
fields.description: How often the §12 scheduler ticks for this Marketplace Account. Per-tick eligibility: last_pull_orders IS NULL OR last_pull_orders <= NOW() - cadence.

fields.label: Polling Status Filter
fields.description: Status filter passed to /orders/V2/getAllOrders. Default 'Manifested' per §12.3.1 — manifest is the operationally-meaningful moment for SI creation.

fields.label: Last Pull Error
fields.description: Last failure message from the polling cron. Empty when the most recent pull succeeded.

fields.label: Last Pull Attempted At
fields.description: Touched on every tick (success or failure) — distinct from last_pull_orders which only advances on success.
